10739307348161.name: Seductive Dream
10739307348161.desc: A sensual and enchanting floral fruity amber fragrance that embodies the captivating and playful GUESS woman.
10739307348161.scentJourney: The fragrance opens with a vibrant blend of pear, apple, bergamot, and mango. The heart reveals a lush bouquet of gardenia, rose, jasmine, and lily of the valley. It settles into a warm, lingering base of vanilla sugar, musk, and amberwood.
10739307348161.brandStory: GUESS is a global lifestyle brand known for its iconic fashion campaigns and youthful, trend-driven apparel. The brand has expanded its empire into the fragrance market, offering accessible, stylish scents that reflect its signature American lifestyle and European fashion sensibilities.
10739307348161.usage: Apply to pulse points such as behind the ears, on the neck, and on the wrists for the best fragrance experience.

10791605534913.name: Shades Blue
10791605534913.desc: A refined Oriental Fougere fragrance for men featuring a blend of citrus, spices, and woods.
10791605534913.scentJourney: Opens with a bright citrus burst, transitions into a spicy and aromatic heart, and settles into a warm, woody base.
10791605534913.brandStory: Armaf is a fragrance house based in the United Arab Emirates known for producing affordable, high-quality alternatives to popular designer scents. They have gained a significant global following for their extensive range of fragrances that offer impressive presentation and scent profiles at accessible price points.
10791605534913.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For EDT concentration, reapply as needed throughout the day for sustained freshness.

10800032022721.name: Rabab
10800032022721.desc: A sophisticated unisex fragrance that masterfully blends oriental and vanilla accords with fresh fruity and floral notes.
10800032022721.scentJourney: Opens with fresh pineapple and delicate hyacinth, transitions into a heart of iris, jasmine, and pink pepper, and settles into a warm base of musk, vanilla, amber, vetiver, and patchouli.
10800032022721.brandStory: Zimaya is a sub-brand of the Afnan Perfumes house, based in the United Arab Emirates. The brand focuses on creating accessible, high-quality fragrances that often draw inspiration from popular luxury scents.
10800032022721.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results, apply to moisturized skin to help the fragrance last longer.

10861327384769.name: Si Intense
10861327384769.desc: A sophisticated and intense interpretation of the original Si, featuring a deeper blend of blackcurrant, rose, and vanilla.
10861327384769.scentJourney: Opens with a vibrant burst of blackcurrant and citrus, transitioning into a heart of lush rose and neroli, settling into a warm, lingering base of vanilla and patchouli.
10861327384769.brandStory: Giorgio Armani is a legendary Italian fashion house known for its timeless elegance and minimalist aesthetic. The fragrance line reflects the brand's commitment to luxury, quality ingredients, and sophisticated compositions.
10861327384769.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. Avoid rubbing the skin after application to maintain the integrity of the fragrance notes.

items.name: Acqua di Gio Eau de Toilette
Emporio Armani In Love With You

10920949285057.name: The Noir 29
10920949285057.desc: A deep, mysterious fragrance centered around black tea leaves, balanced by fresh fig and bay leaf with a woody, tobacco-infused base.
10920949285057.scentJourney: Opens with a bright, fruity-green burst of fig and bergamot, transitioning into a sophisticated heart of cedar and vetiver, settling into a lingering, smoky base of tobacco and hay.
10920949285057.brandStory: Le Labo is a niche perfume house founded in Grasse and based in New York, known for its minimalist aesthetic and 'slow perfumery' approach. They focus on high-quality ingredients and freshly hand-blended fragrances, often naming their scents after the primary note and the number of ingredients used.
10920949285057.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. Avoid rubbing the skin after application to maintain the integrity of the scent profile.

similar.name: Acqua di Gio Eau de Toilette

10925656375489.name: Lynked Freedom
10925656375489.desc: A bold, contemporary aromatic spicy fragrance for men that balances fresh citrus and herbal notes with a warm, sweet caramel drydown.
10925656375489.scentJourney: Opens with a vibrant burst of bergamot, grapefruit, and sage, transitions into a heart of lavender, cardamom, and juniper berry, and settles into a base of vetiver, oriental notes, and caramel.
10925656375489.brandStory: Afnan is a Dubai-based fragrance house known for creating high-quality, accessible perfumes that blend traditional Middle Eastern artistry with modern, mass-appealing scent profiles. The brand is recognized for its diverse portfolio, ranging from fresh daily scents to complex, long-lasting oriental compositions.
10925656375489.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results, spray onto clean, moisturized skin to enhance longevity.
